[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [color](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeColor](../../TextmodeColor.md) / rgba

# Accessor: rgba

## Get Signature

```ts
get rgba(): [number, number, number, number];
```

Plain RGBA tuple with integer components.

### Returns

\[`number`, `number`, `number`, `number`\]

A [r, g, b, a] tuple with values between 0 and 255.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="rgba" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />
